message:
fix(loader): skip empty JSONL files in path discovery fallback

Empty .jsonl files (0 bytes) are now skipped when searching for the
preferred beads data file, preventing load failures when placeholder
files exist alongside valid data.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -82,7 +82,7 @@ c confidence >= 0% | v bead/git | / search | Tab mode | y copy | o open commit |
 bvr 1 Main b Board i Insights g Graph h History | mode=History ◉ Git | focus=list | issues=3/3 | filter=all | sort=defau
